question: Does the notification of practicing the profession of physiotherapist concern you as a natural person?

options.option_text: Yes, it concerns me as a natural person.
No, it does not concern a natural person.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: the procedure is addressed to natural persons.

question: How will the Application-Solemn Declaration for the notification of practicing the profession of physiotherapist be submitted?

options.option_text: Digitally by the applicant.
In person or by post by the applicant.

question: Which of the following educational cases covers your physiotherapy degree?

options.option_text: I hold a degree from the Higher School of Physiotherapists of the Athens General Hospital "Vasilefs Pavlos", or from the former KATEE/KATE physiotherapy schools, or from a TEI physiotherapy department, or from a Greek university School/Department of Physiotherapy.
I hold a degree from an equivalent foreign school according to the legislation in force.
I do not hold a degree that falls under any of the above cases.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: the educational requirement of holding a prescribed physiotherapy degree is not met.

question: For the degree or professional qualifications obtained abroad, which recognition applies to your case?

options.option_text: My degree is a foreign degree with equivalence and correspondence of the study title from the competent recognition services, DOATAP or ITE.

I am a citizen of an EU Member State and obtained my professional qualifications in another Member State, either as self-employed or as an employee, with recognition of professional qualifications or professional equivalence by ATEEN.
I do not fall under any of the above recognition cases.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: the required recognition for a foreign degree or professional qualifications is not met.

question: Have you been convicted of a criminal offence or of an offence related to practicing the professional capacity of physiotherapist?

options.option_text: No, I have not been convicted of any criminal offence or any offence related to practicing my professional capacity.
Yes, I have been convicted of a criminal offence or an offence related to practicing my professional capacity.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: the requirement regarding non-commission of criminal offences is not met.

question: Which of the following citizenship or lawful residence statuses applies to your case?

options.option_text: I am a Greek citizen.
I am a citizen of an EU Member State with EU citizen registration and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a European citizen with permanent residence and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a person of Greek origin with a special identity card for persons of Greek origin and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a person of Greek origin with a residence permit for persons of Greek origin and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a third-country national with proof of submission of an application to renew a residence permit and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a family member of a Greek citizen with permanent residence and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a family member of a Greek citizen with residence and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a third-country national with a personal residence permit and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I am a third-country national with a long-term resident permit and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I have a second-generation residence permit and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I have a highly qualified employment residence permit, the EU Blue Card, and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I have a ten-year residence permit and certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I have a residence title and a cohabitation agreement with a Greek citizen, with certified Greek language proficiency at B2 level.
I do not fall under any of the above citizenship or lawful residence statuses.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: none of the prescribed citizenship or lawful residence cases is covered.

question: Is the requirement for registration with the Panhellenic Association of Physiotherapists met?

options.option_text: Yes, I am registered with the Panhellenic Association of Physiotherapists.

I have a decision recognizing professional qualifications or professional equivalence from ATEEN, I have applied for registration with the competent professional body, and the thirty-day deadline has passed without action.
No, the requirement for registration or presumed registration with the Panhellenic Association of Physiotherapists is not met.
options.termination_reason: Not eligible: the registration requirement with the Panhellenic Association of Physiotherapists is not met.

question: Is the locally competent Regional Unit for the notification located in the territory of the Cyclades?

options.option_text: Yes, it concerns the Regional Unit of Andros, Thira, Kea-Kythnos, Milos, Mykonos, Naxos, Paros, Syros or Tinos.
options.termination_reason: The requirements of this flow are met. The special Cyclades fee is also added to the list of documents and fees.

options.option_text: No, it does not concern a Regional Unit in the territory of the Cyclades.
options.termination_reason: The requirements of this flow are met.
